demo.title: Heads up — this demo only ships the free SRD content
demo.body: Charnik is in active development. I can only include the SRD — the part Wizards of the Coast released for free (CC-BY). The rest of D&D belongs to them, not me, so a lot of it legally can't be here out of the box: Artificer, Aasimar, the Beholder, most subclasses, and loads of spells & monsters. But nothing holds you back — make your own homebrew and, with the flexible CSV system, add whatever you want: from species and classes to spells. You can also download the full desktop app for your computer — it keeps all your data local and needs no internet connection.
